summary: Created the requested runnable helper wrapper script artifact that reuses the reviewed delegate path, preserves parameter-driven input/output behavior, enforces honest evidence-gated success semantics, parses delegate JSON from stdout and optional sidecar via --report-json, uses portable relative resolution, keeps dry-run/zero-PDF outcomes partial, and bounds delegate execution with an explicit timeout.
notes: Exactly one script artifact was produced.
The script is designed as a local helper wrapper around artifacts/scripts/pdf_to_excel_ocr.py rather than a reimplementation.
It preserves traceability fields from the incoming request and emits a structured JSON summary to stdout for reviewability.
